headline: Alphabet (GOOGL): The Best Strong Buy Stock to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years
summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) is one of the 12 Strong Buy Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On May 20, 2026, Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) said it is deepening its presence in Missouri with a new data center in Montgomery County. The company said it is expanding infrastructure “responsibly,” while advancing energy affordability […]
